title: Refresh docs and fix broken links
author: mikl-shortcuts
pr_body_excerpt:
Updated `README.md`:
* Added mentions of 3D and Embeddings generation.
* Fixed the Stargazers link used by the stars count badge.
* Fixed the Project Submission Template link.

Updated `APIDOCS.md`:
* Added a note that the documentation is also available at [https://gen.pollinations.ai/docs](https://gen.pollinations.ai/docs).

gist.headline: The map got pollenated
gist.blurb: The front-door docs now mention 3D and embeddings, and a couple of wandering links have been guided back to the garden path.
gist.summary: Refreshed README.md to mention 3D and embeddings generation, repaired the Stargazers badge and Project Submission Template links, and pointed API readers to gen.pollinations.ai/docs.
gist.impact: Newcomers can discover more of the platform's generation capabilities and reach the stars, submission template, and hosted API docs without chasing broken links.
gist.visual_concept: Polly acts as a tiny garden librarian, repairing a vine-covered signpost with directions to 3D, embeddings, stars, project submissions, and API docs. Friendly code-plants and glowing document pages make the documentation refresh feel like restoring a well-used community garden map.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly, the cute yellow-and-brown striped bee mascot with pink blush, light blue wings, and tiny librarian glasses, carefully fixing a vine-covered garden signpost labeled in simple pixel text: '3D', 'EMBEDDINGS', and 'DOCS'. Lime green (#ecf874) code-plants, little flowers, glowing document pages, and a warm cream-and-lavender background surround her; cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes, nostalgic but beautiful.

Lime green (#ecf874) code-plants, little flowers, glowing document pages, and a warm cream-and-lavender background surround her; cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes, nostalgic but beautiful.
